news.t: Best Dividend ETFs to Buy Now
5 ETFs to Protect Against the Market’s Wild Swings

holdings.infoBox: QDEF is an equity ETF with a total of 138 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 7.97%, NVIDIA at 6.65%, Broadcom at 4.66%, Microsoft at 3.46%, and AbbVie at 2.80%.

overview.description: The FlexShares Quality Dividend Defensive Index Fund (QDEF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of companies with higher dividend yield and lower beta than the Northern Trust 1250 Index. QDEF was launched on Dec 14, 2012 and is issued by FlexShares.

data.title: Best Dividend ETFs to Buy Now
data.text: Are you a set-it-and-forget-it income investor? These dividend ETFs generate case through a variety of long-term strategies.

data.title: 5 ETFs to Protect Against the Market’s Wild Swings
data.text: ETFs invested in defensive companies with a history of raising dividends offer investors a hedge in volatile markets.
